title: Vulkanium optimise
description: Get the most FPS thanks to the Vulkan Engine. Not shader compatible
body:
# Vulkanium optimise 
uses the Vulkan engine instead of openGL, which results in significantly higher performance compared to familiar render optimizations such as Sodium/iris or optifine.

Features:
- Vulkan engine
- zoom
- Display FPS


**Shaders are not supported.**
